ocr_findings.description: Ruby text 'クッキー' above 'cookie' in クロスサイトスクリプティング section not captured in OCR; cosmetic phonetic gloss only
Ruby text 'ディオーエス' above DoS rendered as bold standalone label in OCR rather than inline ruby; content preserved

reviewer_notes: Page 496 of the source. Five attack-type sections: DoS攻撃, 総当たり攻撃, 辞書攻撃, パスワードリスト攻撃, クロスサイトスクリプティング, each with definition, English name, and 語源 box. All definitions and 語源 explanations reproduced completely and accurately. AUTORUN.INF 語源 continuation at top also captured.
